shared_properties: Head, torso, and tail language follow the idle base character model.
Core palette remains #535353 with transparent background cutout only.
Two-frame motion keeps the same 12 FPS cadence as the running loop.
differences: Body height drops to 60px so the head clears the low pterodactyl lane.
The neck stretches forward and the back flattens to create a low profile.
Frame width expands to 118px to keep the tail and snout readable while compressed.

context.usage: Shown while the down input is held to dodge the lower pterodactyl flight path.

shape.silhouette: Flattened side-profile dinosaur with extended snout, compressed torso, and trailing tail on the same ground lane.

face.eyes: One 4x4px eye cutout sits at x20-23 and y18-21 in each frame.
face.mouth: One 12px horizontal mouth slit sits below the eye line.

appendages.arms: Two short forearm clusters stay within a 10x8px chest block.
appendages.legs: Two hind legs use silhouette swaps that preserve the ground contact read.
appendages.tail: One thick tail extends 36px from the torso and rises 6px above the baseline at the tip.

specs.texture: Solid monochrome fill with transparent cutout background.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 236x60px with 2 columns and 1 row.
The highest opaque pixel sits at least 28px lower than the idle pose apex.
The snout, torso, and tail remain readable within a single 118px frame without clipping.
